_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Epididymal sperm counts in Nf1+/- mice were significantly higher than those of Nf1 control mice (p = 0.02)
details: Epididymal sperm counts in Nf1+/- mice were significantly higher (15 ± 2.3 x10^6 spermatozoa/ml) than Nf1+/+ controls (8.8 ± 5.5 x10^6 spermatozoa/ml), p = 0.02
